subject: fix(theme): second review pass on migration guide
body:
- Simplify dark: regex (dark: already matches all compound variants)
- Add warning that DaisyUI semantic tokens change actual rendered colors
- Add warning that component classes change sizing/states, not just colors
- Add localStorage key migration step to Phase 6 cleanup
- Make accessibility check specific (aria-label on toggle, not vague)
- Add "report with file paths and line numbers" to audit prompt template

Tags: documentation, patterns, theme, migration, review
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
